initial_query: Tata Consumer Products is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager in Mumbai. Hybrid role, 5-8 years of experience in SEO, paid media, campaign analytics, and brand performance. Apply only through the official Tata careers portal. No third-party agents or fees.

recruiter_profile.content: Abhishek Sharma | Talent Acquisition Partner, Tata Consumer Products | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhishek-sharma-tata-talent/ | Bio: Internal campus-and-lateral hiring recruiter focused on consumer brands, digital roles, and employer branding.

company_profile.content: Tata group / Tata Consumer Products | Industry: Conglomerate and consumer goods | Size: 800,000+ employees across the Tata group | Website: https://www.tata.com/ | About: Tata's official careers hub lists opportunities across group companies and explicitly warns that it does not charge or accept any amount or security deposit from job seekers.

job_post_comments.content: "Is this open to candidates with agency experience?" | "Applied through the careers page, thanks!" | "Can you share whether the role is hybrid or fully onsite?"

initial_query:
Subject: McKinsey India — Interview Opportunity for Associate Analyst
From: hr.team.mckinseycareers@gmail.com
Hi Sumit, your profile stood out for a remote Associate Analyst role. Please reply with your resume, current salary, and a copy of government ID so we can schedule a same-day screening call on WhatsApp.

recruiter_profile.content: Rohit Kohli | Senior Recruiter | McKinsey & Company | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rohit-kohli-recruitment/ | Bio: Talent acquisition contact claiming to source candidates for consulting and internal support roles.

company_profile.content: McKinsey & Company | Industry: Management consulting | Size: Large global firm | Website: https://www.mckinsey.com/in | About: McKinsey India says it hires for consulting and internal roles and emphasizes problem-solving, people skills, continuous learning, and impact across India.

thread_history.content: Email 1: 'We found your profile via a referral source and want to fast-track you.' Email 2: 'Which office and salary band?' Email 3: 'Details will be shared after you send your ID and confirm availability on WhatsApp.'

initial_query: Hi, this is Narendra from Amazon India HR. We found your resume on LinkedIn and are offering a part-time data tagging role at ₹3,500/day. No interview needed. Join our Telegram training group and pay a refundable activation fee of ₹799 to get your work code. Reply YES to continue.

recruiter_profile.content: Narendra Gandhi | Hiring Manager, Amazon India | WhatsApp: +91 98765 43210 | Bio: 'Urgent remote hiring today, immediate onboarding, message for work code.'

company_profile.content: Amazon India / Amazon.jobs | Industry: E-commerce and cloud services | Size: Very large global company | Website: https://www.amazon.jobs/ | About: Amazon's official careers site lets candidates browse jobs by teams, locations, and job categories. Legit hiring is routed through Amazon's career pages and application tools, not random WhatsApp payment requests.

thread_history.content: Sender: 'Send your full name, city, and payment screenshot.' Candidate: 'Is this listed on Amazon.jobs?' Sender: 'This is an internal slot, only selected candidates can see it.'

job_post_comments.content: Forwarded by a friend: 'Looks fake, they are asking for money up front.'

initial_query: Telegram post in @RemoteHireDaily: '100 work-from-home openings available today. High payout, flexible hours, immediate joining. Message @admin_hr for details.'

recruiter_profile.content: Admin @admin_hr | Telegram channel moderator | Bio: 'Daily hiring updates, urgent openings, immediate joining.'

company_profile.content: No verified company disclosed in the post. The message is being circulated through a Telegram channel with no named employer, office location, careers page, or verifiable brand details.

thread_history.content: User: 'Which company is this for?' Admin: 'Share your name and city first, details later.'

job_post_comments.content: No public comments visible; only a few reactions and 'DM sent' replies.
